prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: project-bound RPG gaslamp-industrial atlas map, first batch pass, landscape orientation
Primary request: Blades in the Dark / Doskvol inspired industrial-gothic world map, single huge primary continent.
Scene/backdrop: overhead birds-eye atlas view of a demon-haunted darkened world surrounding a walled lightning-lit city, with black Void Sea around the land.
Subject: one enormous primary continent with complex realistic coastline: peninsulas, soot-black gulfs, bays, capes, narrow straits, broken industrial shores, curved coasts, canal deltas, inland black seas, and varied landforms. Include Doskvol-like canal districts, lightning rail lines, leaky industrial waterways, walled city sectors, gang territory domains marked by non-text symbols, deathlands beyond the walls, ghost-lit ruins, electroplasmic lightning towers, smuggling docks, leviathan-hunter ports, fog marshes, coal hills, tundra, forests, mountains, wetlands, and ash plains.
Style/medium: Doskvol city district map expanded to continent scale, gothic industrial zones, criminal faction territories marked by non-text sigils, gaslamp fantasy atlas, highly detailed illustrated RPG sourcebook cartography.
Composition/framing: wide 16:9 landscape, full single continent visible with generous black ocean border, large high-resolution atlas feel, clean top-down readability.
Lighting/mood: industrial gothic, perpetual supernatural darkness, smog and fog, flickering gas lamps, electroplasmic blue lightning, criminal underworld tension, hungry ghosts beyond the city lights.
Color palette: charcoal black, tarnished brass, cold blue electroplasm, sickly green fog, soot grey, muted brick red, oil-black ocean.
Materials/textures: blackened parchment, etched coastlines, gaslight glow, soot stains, canal-line geometry, ghostly blue technical overlays.
Constraints: no text labels, no letters, no readable words, no legend, no compass text, no watermark, no UI, no characters or portraits. Make the coastline natural, intricate, and realistic rather than a smooth blob.
